strategy: Raid boss, 56,500 health, team roles. The core rule: never end a round with pips. He Mana Burns the whole team at the end of any round a wizard still holds pips, so spend everything every turn.
Keep an Aura on everyone. When anyone lacks an aura he Quickens the team to max power pips, which then feeds his Mana Burn.
Do not cast X-pip charms or wards; he converts them straight into pips, which then get burned.
Structure setup so each wizard fully spends its pips each round: cheap blades and Feints and timed hits, no banking pips for a big turn.
Funnel to the hitter and burst in windows where pips are spent cleanly.
cheatNotes: When anyone lacks an Aura he Quickens the team to max power pips. Keep auras up to avoid the pip flood.
At the end of any round a wizard still has pips, he Mana Burns the whole team. Spend all your pips every single round.
Casting an X-pip charm or ward makes him remove it and turn it into pips. Avoid X-pip spells here.
